title: Petrol and diesel prices cuts from Wednesday: Here’s how much you’ll pay
description: MOTORING NEWS - The decrease in petrol...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOTORING NEWS - The decrease in petrol prices will be welcomed by cash-strapped motorists ahead of the festive season.","html":"MOTORING NEWS - The decrease in petrol prices will be welcomed by cash-strapped motorists ahead of the festive season."},{"type":"heading","text":"Petrol and diesel prices","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The department of mineral resources and energy (DMRE) announced that both the price of 93-octane and 95-octane petrol will decrease by 51 cents per litre.","html":"The department of mineral resources and energy (DMRE) announced that both the price of 93-octane and 95-octane petrol will decrease by 51 cents per litre."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The price of diesel (0.05% sulphur) decreases by 21 cents per litre, while diesel with 0.005% sulphur goes down by 19 cents per litre.","html":"The price of diesel (0.05% sulphur) decreases by 21 cents per litre, while diesel with 0.005% sulphur goes down by 19 cents per litre."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meanwhile, illuminating paraffin will cost 1 cent less per litre, while the price of LP gas decreases by 61 cents/kg.","html":"Meanwhile, illuminating paraffin will cost 1 cent less per litre, while the price of LP gas decreases by 61 cents/kg."},{"type":"heading","text":"How much will fuel cost you?","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When the fuel price adjustment kicks in, a litre of 93 unleaded petrol will cost R20.97 per litre, while 95 unleaded will be R21.12 a litre.","html":"When the fuel price adjustment kicks in, a litre of 93 unleaded petrol will cost R20.97 per litre, while 95 unleaded will be R21.12 a litre."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The wholesale price of 0.05% (500 PPM) diesel will decrease to R19.13 per litre and 0.005% (50 PPM) will cost R9.20 a litre.","html":"The wholesale price of 0.05% (500 PPM) diesel will decrease to R19.13 per litre and 0.005% (50 PPM) will cost R9.20 a litre."},{"type":"heading","text":"Reasons for petrol price drop","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"DMRE spokesperson Robert Maake said that several factors, including international petroleum product prices and the rand-US dollar exchange rate, contributed to the decrease in petrol and diesel prices.","html":"DMRE spokesperson Robert Maake said that several factors, including international petroleum product prices and the rand-US dollar exchange rate, contributed to the decrease in petrol and diesel prices."},{"type":"heading","text":"Brent Crude Oil price","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Maake said the average Brent Crude oil price decreased from $67.16 to $64.14 during the period under review.","html":"Maake said the average Brent Crude oil price decreased from $67.16 to $64.14 during the period under review."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The decrease in the price of crude oil is due to oversupply because of increased global production as well as uncertainty caused by continued trade tensions which could affect economic growth and demand for crude oil.”","html":"“The decrease in the price of crude oil is due to oversupply because of increased global production as well as uncertainty caused by continued trade tensions which could affect economic growth and demand for crude oil.”"},{"type":"heading","text":"Rand/US dollar exchange","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said the Rand appreciated on average, against the US Dollar (USD), (from 17.49 to 17.29 Rand per USD) during the period under review when compared to the previous one.","html":"He said the Rand appreciated on average, against the US Dollar (USD), (from 17.49 to 17.29 Rand per USD) during the period under review when compared to the previous one."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“This led to lower contributions to the Basic Fuel Prices of petrol by 10.60 c/l, diesel by 11.77 c/l and illuminating paraffin by 11.53 c/l, respectively.”","html":"“This led to lower contributions to the Basic Fuel Prices of petrol by 10.60 c/l, diesel by 11.77 c/l and illuminating paraffin by 11.53 c/l, respectively.”"},{"type":"heading","text":"Slate levy","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Maake said the cumulative slate amounted to a positive balance of R3.74 billion for petrol and diesel at the end of September 2025.","html":"Maake said the cumulative slate amounted to a positive balance of R3.74 billion for petrol and diesel at the end of September 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“In line with the provisions of the self-adjusting slate levy mechanism, the slate levy remains unchanged at zero cents per litre in the price structures of petrol and diesel with effect from 5 November 2025.”","html":"“In line with the provisions of the self-adjusting slate levy mechanism, the slate levy remains unchanged at zero cents per litre in the price structures of petrol and diesel with effect from 5 November 2025.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen","html":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Petrol and diesel prices cuts from Wednesday: Here’s how much you’ll pay
